content: Phase 1: Create deliverables + static validation (42/42, compose config, init.sh e2e, fail-fast)
Phase 2: Backend (FastAPI) - serve files, downloads, zip, live validation endpoint + path-traversal hardening
Phase 2: Frontend (React) dashboard - hero, architecture, ports, fixes, file viewer, validation, quickstart
Phase 2: End to End Testing (iteration_1 99.5%, iteration_2 100% regression)
Phase 2: Fix issues found by testing agent (path-traversal hardening) - verified
